title: callista ochreata
intro: Callista ochreata, also known as the Yellow Callista or Callista, is a flowering plant species in the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe and heal various health issues. The health benefits of Callista ochreata include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Callista ochreata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
